mapper.select: SELECT s.*, -- 使用 COALESCE，如果该学院年级没配置，就默认给 15.0 COALESCE(cr.politics_req, 15.0) AS politicsReq, COALESCE(cr.humanity_req, 15.0) AS humanityReq, COALESCE(cr.innovation_req, 15.0) AS innovationReq, COALESCE(cr.social_req, 15.0) AS socialReq FROM student s -- 核心：通过所属学院和年级，左连接查询配置表 LEFT JOIN credit_requirement cr ON s.student_department = cr.college AND s.grade = cr.grade WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE student
politics_hour = politics_hour + #{hour}, humanity_hour = humanity_hour + #{hour}, innovation_hour = innovation_hour + #{hour}, social_hour = social_hour + #{hour},
humanity_hour = humanity_hour + #{hour},
WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student ORDER BY student_id
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET status = #{status} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

UPDATE student
student_name = #{studentName},
student_department = #{studentDepartment},
grade = #{grade},
politics_hour = #{politicsHour},
humanity_hour = #{humanityHour},
innovation_hour = #{innovationHour},
social_hour = #{socialHour},
password = #{password},
WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
UPDATE student SET password = #{password} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
